title: guettarda ovalifolia
intro: Guettarda ovalifolia, also known as the butterfly tree, is a plant species native to tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which aid in treating various health issues. Its health benefits include the treatment of wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory problems, as well as its use as a natural remedy for fever and digestive issues. Guettarda ovalifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or ointments, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in various ways.
